mapper.sql: jobID, jobCode, jobName, jobAbbr, depID, adminID, jobGrage, jobType, jobProperty, jobNum, isCore, effectDate, xorder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, xType, jobCustom1, jobCustom2, jobCustom3, jobCustom4, jobCustom5
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_job (jobCode, jobName, jobAbbr, depID, adminID, jobGrage, jobType, jobProperty, jobNum, isCore, effectDate, xorder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, xType, jobCustom1, jobCustom2, jobCustom3, jobCustom4, jobCustom5 ) values (#{jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobGrage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isCore,jdbcType=BIT}, #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{xorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

mapper.update:
update ehr_job
jobCode = #{jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jobName = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jobAbbr = #{jobAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobGrage = #{jobGrage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobType = #{jobType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobProperty = #{jobProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobNum = #{jobNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isCore = #{isCore,jdbcType=BIT},
effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
xorder = #{xorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT},
disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xType = #{xType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobCustom1 = #{jobCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobCustom2 = #{jobCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobCustom3 = #{jobCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobCustom4 = #{jobCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobCustom5 = #{jobCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_job set jobCode = #{jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jobName = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jobAbbr = #{jobAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobGrage = #{jobGrage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobType = #{jobType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobProperty = #{jobProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobNum = #{jobNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isCore = #{isCore,jdbcType=BIT}, effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, xorder = #{xorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xType = #{xType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobCustom1 = #{jobCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobCustom2 = #{jobCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobCustom3 = #{jobCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobCustom4 = #{jobCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobCustom5 = #{jobCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} where jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from ehr_job

select * from ehr_job
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCode = #{model.jobCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
jobName = #{model.jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
jobAbbr = #{model.jobAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobGrage = #{model.jobGrage, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobType = #{model.jobType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobProperty = #{model.jobProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobNum = #{model.jobNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
isCore = #{model.isCore, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xorder = #{model.xorder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
xType = #{model.xType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom1 = #{model.jobCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom2 = #{model.jobCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom3 = #{model.jobCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom4 = #{model.jobCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom5 = #{model.jobCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( jobCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or jobName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or jobAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xorder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_job
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCode = #{model.jobCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
jobName = #{model.jobName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
jobAbbr = #{model.jobAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobGrage = #{model.jobGrage, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobType = #{model.jobType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobProperty = #{model.jobProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobNum = #{model.jobNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
isCore = #{model.isCore, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xorder = #{model.xorder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
xType = #{model.xType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom1 = #{model.jobCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom2 = #{model.jobCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom3 = #{model.jobCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom4 = #{model.jobCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobCustom5 = #{model.jobCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( jobCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or jobName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or jobAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xorder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
